Emre

Emre disappeared after a lauded tenure on the Overwatch strike team. He has resurfaced years later, his body and mind manipulated by something unknown.

Damage

Specialist

Istanbul, Turkey (previous), Rome, Italy (current)

Nov 8 (Age: 44)

Abilities

Synthetic Burst RifleCyber FragOverride ProtocolAltered Vitals

Synthetic Burst Rifle

Three-round burst weapon. Hold to zoom in, tightening accuracy and increasing fall off range.

Cyber Frag

Throw a grenade that detonates shortly after bouncing.

Override Protocol

An override initiates, transforming you into a living weapon.

Altered Vitals

Passive health regeneration activates sooner and instantly restores 30 health when activated.

Keys displayed are defaults for PC. They are configurable in game.

Perks

Unlock mid-match upgrades to outsmart, outplay, and dominate the fight. As the action heats up, choose game-changing abilities to amplify your Hero’s power and evolve your strategy in real time.

Minor Perk

(Level 2)

Suppressive Security

Override Protocol’s light rounds slow enemies by 30% for 1 second.

Enhanced Agility

Siphon Blaster’s movement speed bonus is increased by 20% while not firing.

Major Perk

(Level 3)

Heat Sink

Direct hits with Siphon Blaster refunds 60% heat and increase its duration by 0.1 seconds.

Cyber Adhesion

Cyber Frag now sticks on contact, dealing 40 extra damage to stuck enemies.

Keys displayed are defaults for PC. They are configurable in game.

Story

After deciding to seek his own way to help the world, ex-Overwatch operative Emre Sarioglu disappeared one day. He has since mysteriously resurfaced as a ruthless killing cyborg thanks to the malignant force that has corrupted his mind. With what little free will remains, Emre turns to Freja, his most trusted ally, to help him keep his humanity – even at the cost of allying with Talon.

WALKING AWAY

Emre was once known as a tactical prodigy and local hero. His sharp mind and natural leadership skills earned him universal respect, so it came as no surprise that he was the first post-Omnic Crisis addition to the Overwatch Strike Team. He staunchly believed in their mission to help others with unwavering conviction, frequently interfacing with support groups such as Overwatch’s Search and Rescue Team. But years of watching corruption creep into the organization pushed Emre to make the hardest call of his life: to walk away in favor of helping others on his own terms.

OVERRIDDEN

BOUNTY HUNTED

In the years that followed, Emre was spotted conducting missions for Talon. Though he was reportedly effective in combat operations, other agents in Talon noted his unreliability and tendency to go dark for long stretches of time. During one such absence, Maximilien hired the ex-Overwatch bounty hunter Freja, who had been Emre’s dearest friend in his old life. 

When Freja finally managed to track Emre down, he confided in her about his predicament; that he was being overtaken by an unknown force that turned him into a killing machine against his will. Unable to abandon him, Freja chose to stand with him instead of against him. Now the two operate in Talon’s shadow, fighting to keep what remains of Emre’s humanity alive. 

Reign of Talon

Together with Freja, Emre was sent to Watchpoint: Grand Mesa on a high‑risk mission to extract the Soldier Enhancement Serum from the fiercely guarded Naughton Vault. After battling Helix’s Head of Security, Sierra Turner Woods, they escaped with their prize—delivering Vendetta exactly what she needed to move her plans forward.
